cartoons.image_alt: A man speaks to a woman under a shared umbrella as they cross a street in the rain.
cartoons.caption: "What confuses me most about all the parabolic advances with A.I. is that umbrellas are still the same."
cartoons.author: Hartley Lin
cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Monday, June 22nd

humor_links.title: How to be a mysterious woman who is also in bed by 9:30 P.M.
I’ll have kids in a few years, when I’m successful and wealthy and my life is finally perfect.
I am a Tinder guy holding a fish, and I will provide for you.
The most effective group-chat-ending texts.
Behold, I have returned from a hike.

cartoons.image_alt: A young man speaks to an older man who is standing in front of an opened gift and holding a mug that reads “DADS BEST MUG.”
cartoons.caption: "There are limits to my hyperbole."
